summary: Iteration 14 frontend testing complete. All 4 UI improvements verified: 1) POTM homepage shows max 3 results (currently 2 with existing votes), with 'Ψήφισε' link to /vote page. 2) Birthday section is a compact rotating ticker banner with CSS animation. 3) Greek font sizes reduced - hero title uses text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl, all other page titles use text-4xl md:text-5xl. 4) Fixtures section cleaned up - no competition badge text in rows, shows date/teams/score in clean layout.
critical_code_review_comments: Homepage POTM section correctly shows max 3 results (2 shown with current votes)
POTM 'Ψήφισε' link correctly points to /vote page
/vote page loads and shows all 20 first-team players in voting grid
Birthday ticker section uses CSS @keyframes ticker-scroll animation
Birthday ticker pauses on hover (animation-play-state: paused)
Fixtures section rows do NOT contain competition badge text like 'ΠΑΑΟΚ Α Όμιλος'
Fixtures show date, team names, score, and venue in clean layout
Hero title font size reduced to text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl (was text-8xl)
About, Academy, News, Contact page titles all use text-4xl md:text-5xl
Roster regression check passed - all 20 first-team players shown at /team?tab=roster
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified all 4 UI improvements: 1) POTM homepage shows top 3 leaderboard cards with vote link to /vote. 2) Birthday ticker is a horizontally scrolling banner with CSS animation. 3) Font sizes reduced globally - hero uses text-5xl/6xl/7xl, other pages use text-4xl/5xl. 4) Fixtures cleaned up - no competition badge in rows. Roster regression passed (20 players). Vote page shows all 20 first-team players.
